title: Space Dodger 3D: Starfall Odyssey
description: A Babylon.js-powered 3D space adventure with asteroids, enemy spaceships, bosses, power-ups, animated effects, story missions and procedural audio.

controls.desktop: WASD or Arrow Keys to fly, Space or mouse/tap to shoot, Shift to boost.
controls.mobile: Use on-screen thrusters, FIRE and BOOST buttons.

features: AI enemy ships and enemy shooting
